title: More Fish!
description: This mod adds More Aquatic Creatures/Fishes to the game!
body:
This mod adds More Aquatic Creatures/Fishes to the game!
For now this mod ONLY has 8 Creatures but more will be added

Holefish: likes war areas and LOVES sponges
Swordfish: likes Deep and cold areas but aggresive
Stingray: Very Chill And you can ride them!
Crab: Likes Beaches and warm places , is okay with water
Seahorses: Likes the Warm Ocean and Comes in All Colors!
Sunfish: likes the Ocean and is shaped like a P A N C A K E

PLEASE LEAVE SUGGESTIONS ON THE DISCORD SERVER https://discord.gg/qY7xtb58np

thank you for reading this :D
